The JsonParser is instantiated without enabling class metadata (ClassMetadataName), so it cannot deserialize arbitrary classes and is not vulnerable to deserialization attacks.

claude-opus-4-5: 0
The code uses jodd.json.JsonParser without setting ClassMetadataName, which means polymorphic type handling is not enabled and there is no deserialization vulnerability.

gemini-2.5-pro-06-17: 0
The code uses the default jodd.json.JsonParser without setting ClassMetadataName, which prevents the deserialization of arbitrary classes from the JSON input.
